text: For the drainage field test package we recommend Gold Ram Engineering & Development Limited at HK$1,114,790. Gold Ram is a real Hong Kong ground-investigation contractor on the Development Bureau specialist list (Ground Investigation Field Work, Group II) with a 2026 Civil Engineering and Development Department ground-investigation term contract on the public record and no public risk flags. We recommend against the cautionary bidder GI-1 despite its bid being the lowest on the sheet at HK$1,020,590: the public record carries two safety-prosecution convictions at the Labour Department, a fatal flag that disqualifies it regardless of price. The bid leveling reaches the same conclusion on price alone, since GI-1 excluded the water supply (G14) and did not price the freeboard (G16); valued at the peer rate its like-for-like total is HK$1,127,890, above the recommended bid. The runner-up, DrilTech Ground Engineering Limited, also a real Group II GI contractor with a 2025 CEDD term contract, corrected upward from HK$1,067,150 to HK$1,133,150 once an understated line (G13) was recomputed. The submitted quotes are representative for the demonstration; the cautionary firm GI-1 is fictional, and a person approves the award.
